site.tagline: What circulates, what matters, what we need to understand.

nav.botOndaAria: Open Bot ONDA chat in a new tab

Metadata.homeTitle: Precisar · Empower how you use technology
Metadata.homeDescription: Empower how you use technology. Home with hero, rotating verbs, ticker, and stacked sections. Precisar 2026.

homeConvoca.intro: Every day the world creates 463 exabytes of data. Reading it all would take 26 million years. Algorithms shape what we see, read, and believe. Understanding how those filters work is no longer optional.

chile.title: The opportunity in Chile
chile.bodyAfterStat: of Chilean households have internet. But a deeper gap matters: 53% of people do not fully understand what they read, and 5 million people need to build critical digital skills.
chile.pull: We are already connected. What is missing is judgment.

ia.title: AI as an ally
ia.body: Artificial intelligence is already here, filtering our reality. Learning to use it ethically and critically is not the future—it is the present.

propuesta.title: Our approach
propuesta.body1: At Precisar we turn noise into judgment. We show how information is produced and circulates, how content gets prioritised, how to spot bias, and how to verify sources.
propuesta.body2: We build skills to access, analyse, create, and take part—improving how information is available, trustworthy, and shared where it is needed most.

homeConvoca.closing: From connection to understanding. That is what calls us together at Precisar.

homePrograms.title: Programs
homePrograms.stackHeadline: Millions are connected. With judgment, many are still missing.
homePrograms.body: We design tools, content, and training experiences—in person and online—that strengthen critical thinking, digital security, and civic engagement.
homePrograms.stackLinkAprender: Learn Digital: It’s Never Too Late
homePrograms.stackLinkPensamientoCritico: Course: Reading News in the Digital Age
homePrograms.stackLinkBotOnda: Bot Onda / Onda en Mano / Onda Civita and Onda Profes

ciudades.title: Cities Connected with Purpose
ciudades.body: We run workshops and support institutions and municipalities in designing and implementing media and digital literacy strategies. Through participatory diagnostics and community workshops, residents gain skills to access reliable information, develop critical thinking, and participate confidently in the digital environment.

hub.title: Hub Digital Consciente
hub.body: Immersive digital culture experiences for all ages, adaptable to events, municipalities, and educational settings. Through posters, videos, and user-centred interactive applications, we explore topics such as AI, disinformation, and privacy—turning them into participatory experiences that encourage reflection on technology’s impact on society.

aprender.title: Learn Digital: It’s Never Too Late
aprender.body: A programme designed especially for older adults, with in-person and online workshops that combine practical device use, digital safety, and social activities—strengthening their autonomy and connection with family and community.

docentes.title: Media Literacy for Teachers
docentes.body: We offer workshops and teaching resources, classroom guides, and hands-on training for use in class to help students improve how they critically evaluate information, create content, and take part on digital networks—with a responsible, ethical approach online.

homePrecisando.label: Editorial
homePrecisando.stackHeadline: Analysis and debate on how information circulates and what effects it has.
homePrecisando.stackBody: Because information is everywhere—and understanding it is what makes the difference.

homeSaberes.label: Collection
homeSaberes.stackHeadline: It’s much more than learning facts: it’s understanding contexts, applying knowledge, and sharing experiences that strengthen your critical and creative capacity.
homeSaberes.stackBody: This space is designed to support your ongoing learning—to reflect and broaden your perspectives.
